mapper.insert: insert into dispatcher (name, password, email, area_id, status, create_time) values (#{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{areaId}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, name, password, email, area_id, status, create_time from dispatcher where email = #{email} limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dispatcher (name, password, email, area_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{areaId}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE dispatcher
name = #{name},
password = #{password},
email = #{email},
area_id = #{areaId},
WHERE id = #{id}
